Our Story

A Celebration of Flavours

At A&J Restaurant, we bring together the soul of local cuisine and the artistry of international gastronomy. Each dish is crafted with passion, using the finest ingredients to create an unforgettable dining experience.

From the warmth of traditional local recipes passed down through generations to the bold, innovative flavours of global kitchens — our menu is a journey across cultures and tastes, served with heartfelt hospitality.

Culinary Selection

Our Menu

Fufu & Soup GHS 45

Smooth, hand-pounded fufu served with rich palm nut or light soup, garnished with assorted meats.

Local Classic
Jollof Rice GHS 40

Fragrant party jollof rice slow-cooked in seasoned tomato base, served with grilled chicken or fish.

Fan Favourite
Banku & Tilapia GHS 55

Fermented corn & cassava dough served with crispy grilled tilapia and pepper sauce.

Grilled
Kelewele GHS 25

Spiced ripe plantain cubes, deep-fried to golden perfection — a beloved street-food favourite.

Starter
Waakye GHS 38

Traditional rice and beans dish served with spaghetti, salad, gari, and a medley of protein.

Hearty
Kontomire Stew GHS 35

Nutritious cocoyam leaves stew cooked with palm oil, smoked fish, and spices. Served with boiled yam.

Vegetarian Option
Beef Burger GHS 65

Juicy 200g beef patty, aged cheddar, caramelised onions, and house sauce in a toasted brioche bun.

American
Pasta Carbonara GHS 70

Silky egg-yolk sauce, crispy pancetta, Pecorino Romano on al dente spaghetti. Classically Roman.

Italian
Chicken Stir-Fry GHS 60

Wok-tossed chicken with seasonal vegetables in a ginger-soy glaze. Served with steamed jasmine rice.

Asian
Grilled Salmon GHS 90

Atlantic salmon fillet, lemon-herb butter, roasted asparagus, and creamy mashed potato.

Continental
Margherita Pizza GHS 75

Wood-fired thin crust, San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and hand-torn basil leaves.

Italian
Lamb Shawarma GHS 68

Slow-roasted spiced lamb, garlic sauce, pickled vegetables wrapped in warm flatbread.

Middle Eastern

Why Dine With Us

The A&J Experience

We believe dining is more than a meal — it's a memory. From the moment you arrive, every detail is curated to ensure your comfort, delight, and satisfaction.

🍽️
Authentic Taste

Recipes rooted in tradition, elevated with care and fresh ingredients.

International dishes crafted by passionate chefs with world-class training.

You are family here. Expect attentive, gracious service every visit.

A refined, welcoming atmosphere perfect for any occasion.
